rules.title: Forbid server-only imports in `'use client'` files (R12)

check.message: Function accepts FormData but does not call .safeParse(...). Validate the form input with a Zod schema (R14).

rules.title: Server Action files must start with `'use server'` directive (R20)

check.selector: Program:not(Program:has(ExpressionStatement:first-child > Literal[value='use server'])) ExportNamedDeclaration > FunctionDeclaration[async=true], Program:not(Program:has(ExpressionStatement:first-child > Literal[value='use server'])) ExportDefaultDeclaration > FunctionDeclaration[async=true]
check.message: Server Action file must start with 'use server' directive at the top of the file (R20).

examples.good:
'use server';
export async function action() { return 1; }

rulesMd:
<!-- from preset-next-15-canonical/eslint-rules/no-server-imports-in-client.ts -->
## G1 — Forbid server-only imports in `'use client'` files (R12)

**Stack:** react-next  
**Check:** ESLint `rules-as-tests/no-server-imports-in-client` (preset plugin rule)  
**Why:** `'use client'` modules execute in the browser. Server-only modules (`node:fs`, `node:crypto`, `node:path`, infrastructure adapters, `config/env`) crash at runtime or break the bundler. Pass server data through props from a parent Server Component instead.

## G2 — Validate `FormData` parameters via `.safeParse(...)` (R14)

**Stack:** react-next  
**Check:** declarative `no-restricted-syntax` require (eslint-restricted engine)  
**Selector:** `:function:not(:has(CallExpression[callee.property.name='safeParse'])):has(Identifier[typeAnnotation.typeAnnotation.typeName.name='FormData'], Identifier[typeAnnotation.typeAnnotation.typeName.right.name='FormData'])`  
**Why:** Function accepts FormData but does not call .safeParse(...). Validate the form input with a Zod schema (R14).

## G3 — Server Action files must start with `'use server'` directive (R20)

**Stack:** react-next  
**Check:** declarative `no-restricted-syntax` require (eslint-restricted engine)  
**Selector:** `Program:not(Program:has(ExpressionStatement:first-child > Literal[value='use server'])) ExportNamedDeclaration > FunctionDeclaration[async=true], Program:not(Program:has(ExpressionStatement:first-child > Literal[value='use server'])) ExportDefaultDeclaration > FunctionDeclaration[async=true]`  
**Why:** Server Action file must start with 'use server' directive at the top of the file (R20).
